_comment: Auto Audio Depth Estimation - lightweight research archive. Champions are keyed by MECHANISM (lineage), not parameter values. results.tsv is the authoritative per-run log; this file records lineage-level state. Composite (honest) = rmse/1.6 + (1-d1)/0.46 + 0.3*abs_rel/0.4 (lower is better). Noise sigma ~= 0.008 (20+ reruns), up to ~0.014-0.019 on small samples; require >noise AND >=2-3 confirming draws before crowning.

metric.note: abs_rel is directly optimised by the relative loss term -> partly gameable; rank on the composite and never let a method win one metric while badly regressing the others.

global_champion.note: Eval-time L/R-flip TTA on top of the fef2779 architecture. Deterministic honest ensembling; RMSE & d1 best-ever. This is the active train.py.

coarse-ray-reasoning.note: coarse 16x32 ray<->ray self-attn; first architectural win.

post-fusion-geometry.note: 2 geo self-attn blocks on fused m16 (rsa16b); later E56/E57 gains found within noise (E60).

decoder-fusion-skip-modulation.note: gated skips + drop finest F64 cross-attn (big efficiency win).

depth-objective.note: MAE + 0.1 rel + 0.05 grad + load-bearing coarse/low aux terms.

simplification.note: drop pix2pix encoder tail; 24.47->7.69M params, -69%, provably equivalent. Pre-TTA base champion.

informative_failures.lesson: Training-time L/R-equivariance self-distillation is REDUNDANT with the free eval-time TTA (S12) that already ensembles the symmetry; full-batch busts the budget (E131 552s/ep), quarter-batch (E132) scores 2.0925 > champion 2.079. Don't spend training compute to reproduce what TTA gives for free.
Geometry bias on ray<->audio cross-attn is WITHIN NOISE of baseline; crowned on 2 lucky draws then demoted when the 3rd draw (E125) exposed it. Never crown sub-0.015 candidates on <3 draws.
Soft-argmax bin decode HURTS (d1 -0.014): the audio->depth field is smooth, so expectation-smoothing blurs it.
5ch cues are load-bearing; absolute level is a depth cue (do not jitter); explicit positional info is neutral-to-harmful. Deeper representation search is gated by prepare.py (PROPOSAL-01).
Not capacity- or resolution-limited; heavy capacity busts the 1-hour budget.

specialists.note: berHu main loss: RMSE 1.4746 (strong) but ABS_REL/d1 sink -> a pure RMSE specialist / frontier slide, not a champion.
berHu on low-pass term: RMSE 1.4496 best-ever-RMSE but frontier-slides d1 -> RMSE specialist.

recombination_candidates.rationale: Training-side L/R equivariance may improve the base model that TTA ensembles; complementary if the base gain exceeds TTA's reduced marginal. Currently INTERRUPTED at E131 - resume and judge.
